properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thanks for the sunshine Thanks for love Thanks for the flowers Rain from above Thanks for the children For each girl and boy Thanks for the laughter Thanks for the joy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord so many times I prayed so selflessly Lord so many times You bless abundantly So this time, oh Lord I don't want anything I just want to say thanks For the letting this old boy sing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thanks for labor Thanks for tears

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So this time, Lord, I don’t want anything I just want to thank you for giving me a song to sing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Thanks for the promise You’ve made it all good For those who would trust You You said that you would

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So thanks for tomorrow Fill it with love We know that all good things Come from above

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So thank you Thank You, Lord
